title: Domain Engineering policy manifest — ADR-0128 / ADR-0129 §4
note: Index of the domain-engineering policy tables. policyVersion is the calibration unit's third axis (rule × host × policyVersion). A material weight/threshold/hard-trigger change bumps this version and resets predictive rule confidence (ADR-0129 §4, §7).

changeClasses.observationalAdjustment: shadow/non-blocking weight tweak; calibration receipt; no ADR when enforcement power is unchanged.
changeClasses.automaticPromotion: rule evolves up to its maximumAutomaticLevel on evidence; no further human action per transition.
changeClasses.changeOfMaximumAuthority: raising maximumAutomaticLevel / accepted evidence types / fail mode — requires a governed Decision.
changeClasses.materialEnforcementChange: new hard trigger / new block case / reduced fail-open / new obligation — requires a Decision and resets rule confidence.
